{{Quote|A business man I am.|Dugo Bagy to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>}}
The [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]], '''Dugo Bagy''' was solicited for information about [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] operations by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] while at [[Riebold's Foam and Sizzle]]. Bagy stated that Calrissian was mining [[Platinum/Legends|platinum]] on [[Kerane's Folly/Legends|Kerane's Folly]], an asteroid in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. This was largely a cover, however. It was primarily being used as a training ground of sorts for smugglers trying to evade [[Kyp Durron]]'s [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen-and-Two Avengers]].

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
